sections.paragraph:
περισῴζω (X. et al.; 1 Km 30:17 v.l.; Ps 114:4 Aq.; ViOb 3 [p. 82, 6 Sch.]; Joseph.) rescue (from death) Mk 6:51 v.l.—DELG s.v. σῶς.

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Aq Aq , II a.d.—List 5

Sch. Sch. = TSchermann, Prophetarum vitae fabulosae—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 806
